case_title: PATEL, N.R. vs. DICKENS, THOMAS et al

docket_entries.description: DEPT#206 JUDGE PROTEM: ANTOINETTE YOUNG; CSR:B.BALIAN;CLERK:E.ESTACIO 4:27 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIP READ ON RECORD.
